chapter_title: Outdoor Signs & Motorist Info. Panels on Toll Roads in Certain Counties
text:
In this subchapter:

(1) “Governing body” includes only the governing body of a toll road authority.

(2) “Sign” means a display, light, device, figure, painting, drawing, message, plaque, poster, or other thing designed or used to advertise or inform.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 395. Outdoor Signs & Motorist Info. Panels on Toll Roads in Certain Counties
##### § 395.002 — Definitions

In this subchapter:

    (1) “Governing body” includes only the governing body of a toll road authority.

    (2) “Sign” means a display, light, device, figure, painting, drawing, message, plaque, poster, or other thing designed or used to advertise or inform.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: “Governing body” includes only the governing body of a toll road authority.
“Sign” means a display, light, device, figure, painting, drawing, message, plaque, poster, or other thing designed or used to advertise or inform.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
